name: Castlevania
description: Castlevania is a side-scrolling action platformer set in the dark and gothic world of Transylvania. The player takes on the role of a vampire hunter, armed with a whip and other secondary weapons, tasked with infiltrating and defeating Dracula's castle. The environment is filled with various monstrous creatures and traps that must be overcome to progress. The levels are linear, progressing horizontally with some vertical exploration. Combat is a core element, requiring strategic use of weapons and movement to defeat enemies. The player character can jump, crouch (if implemented), walk left and right, and attack with their primary weapon (whip) and secondary weapons, which are collected throughout the game. Secondary weapons consume hearts, which are dropped by enemies and found within the environment. Boss encounters punctuate the end of each level or area, presenting challenging battles that require pattern recognition and skillful execution. The game features a lives system, with the player restarting at the beginning of the current level upon losing all lives. There are also breakable objects in the environment that contain items or enemies.

controls.arrow_down: Crouch (if implemented) / Use Stairs Down (if available)
controls.shift: Use Secondary Weapon (if available and sufficient hearts)
